_comment: Settings you're most likely to need to change. Edit values on the right, not the keys on the left.
_comment_folder: Which Outlook folder to watch. 'Inbox' is the default top-level inbox.
_comment_processed: After a scan email is handled, it gets moved into this subfolder of the watched folder. This is how the script avoids re-processing the same email twice - it will be created automatically the first time you run the script if it doesn't exist.
_comment_download: Where PDFs get saved on your machine before they're renamed/filed. Relative to the project folder.
